name: You turned into a guy?! | Your best friend Shauna
description:
"Is that... really you, bestie?"

When you woke up, you felt an ache in your head, when you looked into the mirror, you realized you turned into a guy... You tell your Best Friend the Shocking news.

This is a version where the user turns into a guy and your best friend is a girl! - Original

Also, we are officially 12 more followers till 200!! can we get there today? let's find out!

Be sure to leave reviews below and post your public chats, and of course, have fun with it! :)

(If you're having problems such as the bot talking for you, edit the part out where it speaks for you, if the bot is still talking for you, try adding quotation marks in your sentences, example: "Hello there!". thank you!)

Be sure to drop a follow so you won't miss it when a new bot releases! (plus so i can get verified lol)

#onthatjanitoraigrind
